Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame City]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Blackflame City is a location where Eithan's clan organizes street sweepers.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan spent his childhood in Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin has never been to Blackflame City.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Blackflame City contains an Imperial palace.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Blackflame City is the capital of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor decreed that all important sects, schools, and clans should head to Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor called only the strongest and most influential to Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Blackflame City has hundreds of medical tents set in long rows outside its walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame camp is located outside the walls of Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperial cloudship waited just outside the walls of Blackflame City.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Blackflame City is a city with buildings below the training room window.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Blackflame City is a location that Yerin does not want Dreadgods to trample.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Blackflame City is a location where one can return with wishes granted.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Similar failures to Ozmanthus' work were once kept in Blackflame City.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Blackflame City was evacuated before the Wandering Titan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The group will emerge in Blackflame City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — New presences were coming from the direction of Blackflame City.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Blackflame City is a reference used by Eithan regarding the naming of Windfall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
